hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: All four crypto assets show flat direction with negative composites and alphas, and elevated volatility. ETH and SOL have beta > 1, amplifying downside risk. LTC exhibits the weakest alpha and composite, while BTC, though the cleanest, still carries a negative composite. The overall environment is defensive; we should preserve liquidity, keep any exposure minimal, and await confirming price action before turning constructive.
